tests/us-024/inference-schema.test.ts: createInference preserves the provided statement

tests/us-024/inference-schema.test.ts: createInference preserves the provided confidence label
tests/us-024/inference-schema.test.ts: isValidInference returns true for a well-formed inference object

tests/us-024/inference-schema.test.ts: isValidInference rejects when statement is missing

tests/us-024/inference-schema.test.ts: isValidInference rejects when statement is not a string

tests/us-024/inference-schema.test.ts: isValidInference rejects when confidence is not one of low/medium/high
